name: vp-studio
description: VP Studio toolkit for animation, virtual production, and VFX pipelines — mocap, MetaHuman, Unreal, nDisplay, LED wall workflows

hub_root.title: Hub root
hub_root.description: Root of the knowledge Hub (docs, sessions, DB, inbox, wiki). All Hub subpaths default to this root.

docs_root.title: Hub docs root
docs_root.description: Domain-categorized documents. Skills read/write session files, briefings, daily recaps under this path.

sessions_root.title: Pipeline sessions root
sessions_root.description: VP Supervisor session files. Used by take-log, opt-review, color-check, shoot-gate, kpi-report, etc.

briefings_root.title: Briefings root
briefings_root.description: Per-department briefing outputs. Used by team-brief, mocap-brief, brief-scene.

mocap_sessions_root.title: MoCap sessions root
mocap_sessions_root.description: MoCap session files (OptiTrack/Motive take logs, retargeting notes).

risk_playbooks_root.title: Risk playbooks root
risk_playbooks_root.description: Risk-scenario playbook repository. risk-flag skill references these for on-site emergency response.

daily_root.title: Daily recap root
daily_root.description: Cross-domain daily recaps. daily-recap and supervisor-recap write here.

inbox_root.title: Inbox root
inbox_root.description: Raw source materials awaiting distillation into wiki. compile-wiki input.

doc_manager_db_path.title: doc_manager DB path
doc_manager_db_path.description: SQLite FTS5 index for document search. Project-owned; Plugin reads via hub_cli.doc_manager.

hub_cli_python.title: Python executable
hub_cli_python.description: Python interpreter used to invoke Project Hub CLIs. Override for virtualenv (e.g., `.venv/Scripts/python.exe`).

hub_cli_doc_manager.title: doc_manager CLI path
hub_cli_doc_manager.description: Path to Project's doc_manager CLI. Used by search-docs, doc-stats, new-doc.

hub_cli_doc_verifier.title: doc_verifier CLI path
hub_cli_doc_verifier.description: Path to Project's doc_verifier CLI. Used by verify-docs.

hub_cli_reviewer.title: vp-review CLI path
hub_cli_reviewer.description: Path to Project's reviewer CLI. Used by vp-review.

hub_cli_confluence_migrator.title: confluence_migrator CLI path
hub_cli_confluence_migrator.description: Path to Confluence migrator CLI. Invoked only if confluence_enabled is true.

ollama_enabled.title: Enable Ollama/Gemma delegation
ollama_enabled.description: If true, agents may delegate summarization, translation, and boilerplate tasks to a local Ollama model via gemma.ps1.

ollama_endpoint.title: Ollama endpoint
ollama_endpoint.description: HTTP endpoint of the Ollama server. gemma.ps1 posts to this URL root.

ollama_model.title: Ollama model tag
ollama_model.description: Default model tag for gemma.ps1. Override per call via script argument.

ollama_temperature.title: Ollama temperature
ollama_temperature.description: Default sampling temperature for Gemma delegation. Override per call via script argument.

vpo_plugin_root.title: VPO UE plugin root
vpo_plugin_root.description: Local path to the VPO UE plugin workspace (e.g., Z:/VPO/1_Plugins). Leave empty to disable UE plugin-related skills.

perforce_workspace_root.title: Perforce workspace root
perforce_workspace_root.description: Local Perforce workspace root (e.g., C:/ws/depot). Referenced by asset-checklist and opt-review.

ue_engine_5_7_path.title: UE 5.7 install path
ue_engine_5_7_path.description: Unreal Engine 5.7 install directory. Used by new-plugin build scripts when registry auto-detect fails. Additional UE versions can be added as separate fields (ue_engine_5_8_path, etc.).

confluence_enabled.title: Enable Confluence migration
confluence_enabled.description: Gate for confluence-related skills. If false, the migrator CLI is not invoked.

confluence_base_url.title: Confluence base URL
confluence_base_url.description: Base URL of the Confluence instance. Required when confluence_enabled is true.

telemetry_enabled.title: Enable telemetry hooks
telemetry_enabled.description: If true, Project-side hook_recorder emits telemetry events. Plugin does not implement telemetry; this toggle signals intent.

notify_channels.title: Notification channels
notify_channels.description: Comma-separated list of channels enabled for notify skill. Example: "telegram,discord". Tokens/config live in Project layer.

hub_read_only_paths.title: Hub read-only paths
hub_read_only_paths.description: Comma-separated glob patterns (relative to CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR) that Plugin skills must never write. User-owned or archive-only areas.
